name: Veggie Burgers 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Shape the mixture into burger patties.
3. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius) for about 20 minutes, or until the burgers are firm and lightly browned.
